name: LiveProtein
description: LiveProtein is a blend of organic pumpkin seed protein, pea protein, and prebiotics (inulin) with high bioavailability and digestibility. It is a plant-based protein with a complete amino acid profile for daily needs without any major food allergens.

dosage.therapeutic: 2 scoops (20g) mixed with 200ml water, serve promptly
dosage.general: Mix with water and serve promptly

ingredients: Organic pumpkin seed protein (USDA NOP certified)
who_can_consume: Elderly, vegetarians, growing children, pregnant/breastfeeding mothers, sports lovers, those wanting weight management, people with lactose intolerance or egg/milk/cheese allergies.
who_cannot_consume: Not specified. Consult a healthcare professional if you have kidney conditions or specific protein restrictions.

qa.question: Is LiveProtein suitable for people with allergies?
qa.answer: Yes, LiveProtein is allergen-free, lactose-free, and contains no major food allergens. It is gluten-free, non-dairy, soy-free, vegan-friendly, organic, and non-GMO.

qa.question: How does it taste?
qa.answer: LiveProtein has a mild nutty taste with a pleasant aroma and no aftertaste (unlike soy protein). It has a greenish yellow color when mixed with warm water.
